content_of_post_to_comment: Learn how to say “I’m fucking sorry” when you’re wrong. So people don’t have to second-guess your manipulative bullshit. So they don’t have to be the ones constantly apologizing for things they didn’t do. Fucking own it. Take responsibility. Learn how to apologize. We’re not kids anymore. And if your ego is bigger than your ability to say sorry, then maybe it’s time to heal yourselves, motherfuckers.
comment: The harder part of an apology isn’t saying the words, it’s giving up the need to control the other person’s version of events. Accountability fails when “sorry” becomes another way to defend the ego.
